ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seismic_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seismic event */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the seismic event */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the seismic event */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the seismic event */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the seismic event */,
  "magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the seismic event */,
  "mag_type" TEXT /* Type of magnitude (e.g., Mx) */,
  "nb_stations" INTEGER /* Number of seismic stations that recorded the event */,
  "gap" INTEGER /* Gap in the seismic data */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the seismic station to the event */,
  "rms" REAL /* Root mean square of the seismic data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the seismic data */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the location */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the seismic event (e.g., earthquake, aftershock) */,
  "event_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the event */,
  "event_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., preliminary, final, updated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seismic_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seismic station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the seismic station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the seismic station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the seismic station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the seismic station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the seismic station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., permanent, temporary) */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "station_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the station */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_stations" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic station */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Time the seismic station recorded the event */,
  "signal_to_noise_ratio" REAL /* Signal-to-noise ratio of the recorded data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the recorded data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Strength of the signal recorded */,
  "distance_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty in the distance measurement */,
  "azimuth" REAL /* Azimuth of the seismic wave */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "magnitude_types" (
  "mag_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each magnitude type */,
  "mag_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the magnitude type (e.g., Mx) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the magnitude type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the magnitude (e.g., Mw, Mb) */,
  "scale_factor" REAL /* Scale factor for the magnitude type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mag_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., preliminary, final) */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Name of the report author */,
  "report_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, reviewed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reports_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., uploaded, processed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., acceleration) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, satellite) */,
  "data_precision" REAL /* Precision of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_data" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "data_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data (e.g., g, m/s) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty in the data value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrumentation" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., accelerometer) */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the instrument should be calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_station" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was installed */,
  "installation_engineer" TEXT /* Name of the engineer who installed the instrument */,
  "installation_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the installation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id", "station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_data" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "data_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data (e.g., g, m/s) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty in the data value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id", "event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was calibrated */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Calibration value */,
  "calibration_engineer" TEXT /* Name of the engineer who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instrumentation ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "maintenance_engineer" TEXT /* Name of the engineer who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instrumentation ("instrument_id")
)
